texto: Her face flushed, her eyes flared and she poked him in the chest. "Ach, I had nae caution, you brastling gaupie! What about you? You recklessly left the sword out when there are children around!"Anger crackled in every fibre of her body. He felt it. He saw it in the flash of her hair, the light of her eyes. But she was standing right in front of him and she was so very whole."Reckless!" He grabbed her arms and yanked her to him. "I'll show you reckless!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Nicole Locke que provoca temas ligados a amor. Ao questionar “Her face flushed, her eyes flared and she poked him in the chest.
